title: Palestinian Delight
description: A mod that brings Palestinian dishes and ingredients to your table!
body:
A mod that brings Palestinian dishes and ingredients to your table! 

It is possible to play this mod on its own but many recipes will be unavailable to craft if Farmers Delight or Pams Harvestcraft are not installed.

Planned additions:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
- More dishes
  - Musakhan
  - Maqluba
- More detailed olive growing mechanics
- More uses for Olive Oil
  - Recipe integration with mods as fuel/in bioreactors
  - Soap
</details>

Credit goes to Veneli for these textures:
- Olive
- Olive Oil
- Rose Water
- Sumac
